query:
SELECT 
  id, email, step, userId,
  joiningFeePaidAt, mandateId, billingRequestId,
  contractSignedAt, createdAt, updatedAt, expiresAt
FROM join_sessions
WHERE email = 'astmeridian@outlook.com'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
